stemHtml: According to OPS regulations, the minimum required navigational equipment is as follows for operations under IFR or VFR along routes not navigable by reference to visual landmarks…

options.a: GPS for low-level flights; one area navigation equipment If the flight is to be flown, requiring area navigation; and one VOR receiver.
options.b: One VOR receiver; and one area navigation equipment If the flight is to be flown requiring area navigation.
options.c: Two VOR receivers if the route is to be flown using VOR navaids only; two NDB receivers if the route is to be flown using NDB navaids only; and one GPS for low-level flights.
options.d: Two VOR receivers if the route is to be flown using VOR navaids only; two NDB receivers if the route is to be flown using NDB navaids only; and one area navigation equipment if the flight is to be flown requiring area navigation.
